steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank follows “despite the damage _______ Soviet censors.” The word ‘despite’ signals an obstacle. The blank must make the censors the source of the damage to the novel.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — concealed from: would make the novel the agent harming the censors — the opposite of what the context requires. ✗
  • Choice B — bestowed on: implies the censors suffered the damage, not caused it. ✗
  • Choice C — allocated to: same problem as B — censors as victims, not agents. ✗
  • Choice D — wrought by: means ‘caused by,’ correctly positioning the censors as the ones who damaged the work. ✓
That matches Choice D — wrought by.
